creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
thierry     2007-10-21 14:00:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/pyrex          Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The current version of Pyrex, 0.9.6, contains bugs mentioned in the
  change log for Pyrex 0.9.6.1. These bug(s) result in breaking ports
  dependent on Pyrex. These issues has been resolved in Pyrex 0.9.6.1 and
  later. The most recent version of Pyrex is 0.9.6.3 but it won't build
  and a patch has been issued to the developer of Pyrex, I have therefore
  chosen to update to version 0.9.6.2 which have been tested and fixes the
  above mentioned issues with depending ports (for example py-fastaudio
  which I maintain).
  
  PR:             ports/117372
  Submitted by:   Pontus Stenetorp <ninjin (at) kth.se>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.29      +1 -1      ports/devel/pyrex/Makefile
  1.23      +3 -3      ports/devel/pyrex/distinfo
  1.17      +3 -0      ports/devel/pyrex/pkg-plist
